title: Officially Broke
description: The treasury is empty. Creditors seized the palace furniture, including your favorite chair.
subtitle: The treasury is empty.
archive_hint: Empty the treasury and meet your creditors.

title: People Had Enough
description: The people stormed the palace, mostly because it had the only working air conditioner.
subtitle: The people stormed the palace, mostly because it had the only working air conditioner.
archive_hint: Let happiness collapse completely.

title: Nationwide Shrug
description: Order collapsed completely. The last traffic sign was traded for a sandwich.
subtitle: Order collapsed completely.
archive_hint: Let order fall to zero.

title: A Very Polite Coup
description: The generals and ministers replaced you during lunch. The paperwork was already prepared.
subtitle: The generals and ministers replaced you during lunch.
archive_hint: Lose the loyalty of the elite.

title: Beloved Retirement
description: You canceled the eternal parade. Citizens gifted a quiet chair. It was enough.
subtitle: You canceled the eternal parade.
archive_hint: Earn a gentle farewell after a long, kind rule.

title: The Country Somehow Works
description: All four meters stayed green long enough to embarrass the cynics. Historians filed Ministan under 'accidental competence.'
subtitle: All four meters stayed green long enough to embarrass the cynics.
archive_hint: Keep every plate spinning until the credits.

title: Peaceful Accidental Democracy
description: A ceremonial form accidentally counted real preferences. Ministan celebrated with orderly queues and surprising ballots.
subtitle: A ceremonial form accidentally counted real preferences.
archive_hint: Misplace power so politely that democracy appears.

title: The Loyal Protector
description: General Boom never seized the palace. He only seized every parade schedule until the end of time.
subtitle: General Boom never seized the palace.
archive_hint: Keep General Boom proudly on your side.

title: Olga Sends You Home
description: Auntie Olga refused the crown and suggested you try living like a neighbor. The movement stayed civic. The palace felt suddenly quiet.
subtitle: Auntie Olga refused the crown and suggested you try living like a neighbor.
archive_hint: Let Auntie Olga decide you need a nap at home.

title: Clerk Zero Closes the File
description: Clerk Zero closed the national folder. Dust settled. A blank form remained as a souvenir.
subtitle: Clerk Zero closed the national folder.
archive_hint: Allow Clerk Zero to file you under Closed.

title: The Balanced Miracle
description: Minister Penny balanced the final budget without deleting the citizens. Historians still check the footnotes twice.
subtitle: Minister Penny balanced the final budget without deleting the citizens.
archive_hint: Help Minister Penny balance the impossible ledger.

title: Profit Buys Retirement
description: Sir Profit retired on a yacht named Alignment. Public signs returned. The invoice was enormous.
subtitle: Sir Profit retired on a yacht named Alignment.
archive_hint: Accept Sir Profit's luxurious exit package.

title: The Spreadsheet State
description: The ledger became a religion. Citizens prayed in columns. Happiness was a rounding error.
subtitle: The ledger became a religion.
archive_hint: A path involving the spreadsheet state is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Austerity Without Citizens
description: The books were perfect. The streets were empty. Minister Penny filed a victory form.
subtitle: The books were perfect.
archive_hint: A path involving austerity without citizens is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Broadcast State
description: Ministan became a continuous special report. Citizens lived between commercial breaks. Historians still wait for the credits.
subtitle: Ministan became a continuous special report.
archive_hint: A path involving the broadcast state is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Olga's People's Cabinet
description: Kitchen-table petitions became ministries. Auntie Olga brought thermos flasks to cabinet. The palace learned queue etiquette.
subtitle: Kitchen-table petitions became ministries.
archive_hint: A path involving olga's people's cabinet is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Palace Hears the Street
description: The ruler listened. The street answered with sandwiches and schedules. Reform arrived wearing sensible shoes.
subtitle: The ruler listened.
archive_hint: A path involving the palace hears the street is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Experimental Republic
description: Every law became a trial and every trial became a law. Historians request safety goggles.
subtitle: Every law became a trial and every trial became a law.
archive_hint: A path involving the experimental republic is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Experiment Leaves
description: Science packed politely and took a taxi. Clerk Zero stamped EXIT. The beakers waved.
subtitle: Science packed politely and took a taxi.
archive_hint: A path involving the experiment leaves is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Corporate Ministan, LLC
description: Public benches became brand real estate. Historians list the country as a sitting subscription with a flag.
subtitle: Public benches became brand real estate.
archive_hint: A path involving corporate ministan, llc is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Country Is Acquired
description: Ministan became a subsidiary with a flag. Letterhead changed. Historians list shareholders first.
subtitle: Ministan became a subsidiary with a flag.
archive_hint: A path involving the country is acquired is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Purrfect Transfer
description: Whiskers completed a solemn transfer of symbolic power. You became Chief Litter Officer. The nation napped.
subtitle: Whiskers completed a solemn transfer of symbolic power.
archive_hint: A path involving the purrfect transfer is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Government by Form
description: Ministan ran on Form F-0 and a paid efficiency miracle. Historians list the country as a filing cabinet with a flag.
subtitle: Ministan ran on Form F-0 and a paid efficiency miracle.
archive_hint: A path involving government by form is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Final Stamp
description: One last stamp descended on Ministan. Forms governed forms. Historians requested larger cabinets.
subtitle: One last stamp descended on Ministan.
archive_hint: A path involving the final stamp is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Happiness Reaches 100%
description: The National Happiness Index froze at perfection. Streets remained complicated. Historians filed it under measured triumph.
subtitle: The National Happiness Index froze at perfection.
archive_hint: A path involving happiness reaches 100% is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Tanks Direct Everything
description: Parking, traffic, and policy answered to tread marks. Historians underline the civic square in armor.
subtitle: Parking, traffic, and policy answered to tread marks.
archive_hint: A path involving tanks direct everything is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The National Mascot General
description: General Boom now rides a parade float shaped like himself. Authority remains ceremonial. The salute is mandatory.
subtitle: General Boom now rides a parade float shaped like himself.
archive_hint: A path involving the national mascot general is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Everyone Is a Millionaire
description: Ministan printed until every citizen was rich and broke. Wheelbarrows became wallets. Historians call it festive arithmetic.
subtitle: Ministan printed until every citizen was rich and broke.
archive_hint: A path involving everyone is a millionaire is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Great Cheese Settlement
description: Border toast resumed. Tinyria complimented Ministan's maturity. Historians filed dairy diplomacy.
subtitle: Border toast resumed.
archive_hint: A path involving the great cheese settlement is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Eternal National Festival
description: The credits never rolled. Confetti became weather. Sleep became optional.
subtitle: The credits never rolled.
archive_hint: A path involving eternal national festival is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Parade Republic
description: General Boom seized power during a marching rehearsal. The coup lasted four minutes but was very synchronized.
subtitle: General Boom seized power during a marching rehearsal.
archive_hint: A path involving the parade republic is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Scientific Golden Age (Preliminary)
description: The artificial sun stayed up. Historians call it a golden age with invoices attached and nights marked optional.
subtitle: The artificial sun stayed up.
archive_hint: A path involving scientific golden age (preliminary) is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The AI Accepts Your Resignation
description: A polite email ended the term. Subject line: Optimization complete.
subtitle: A polite email ended the term.
archive_hint: A path involving the ai accepts your resignation is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Moon Has a New Owner
description: Title transferred. Night remained free to look at. Ownership was another matter.
subtitle: Title transferred.
archive_hint: A path involving the moon has a new owner is waiting in late-game choices.
newspaper_headline: The Moon Has a New Owner

title: Democracy by Administrative Error
description: A void stamp arrived one day late. By then the tallies had become government. Clerk Zero filed it under unintended consequences.
subtitle: A void stamp arrived one day late.
archive_hint: A path involving democracy by administrative error is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Palace Beautiful and Empty
description: The ballroom won awards. Nobody lived there fully. Beauty filed for divorce from use.
subtitle: The ballroom won awards.
archive_hint: A path involving palace beautiful and empty is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Renovation Reveals the Truth
description: Ledgers went on display. Scaffolding became a museum. The country learned what gold cost.
subtitle: Ledgers went on display.
archive_hint: A path involving renovation reveals the truth is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Soft Exit Smile
description: You abdicated on live television with a wink. The catchphrase outlived the throne.
subtitle: You abdicated on live television with a wink.
archive_hint: A path involving the soft exit smile is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Smallest Superpower
description: Ministan signed a volume treaty and called it soft power. Historians list the country as a tiny superpower of negotiated noise.
subtitle: Ministan signed a volume treaty and called it soft power.
archive_hint: A path involving smallest superpower is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Traffic Achieves Peace
description: Ministan solved gridlock with schedules, flowers, and one very polite roundabout. Historians call it the Quiet Commute Accords.
subtitle: Ministan solved gridlock with schedules, flowers, and one very polite roundabout.
archive_hint: A path involving traffic achieves peace is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Day Everyone Stopped Believing
description: Official information became optional. Screens went politely blank. The nation shrugged in stereo.
subtitle: Official information became optional.
archive_hint: A path involving the day everyone stopped believing is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Eternal Smile Republic
description: Frowning was classified as treason. Historians agree everyone looked very committed.
subtitle: Frowning was classified as treason.
archive_hint: A path involving the eternal smile republic is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Competent Successor
description: A quiet deputy inherited the desk without fireworks. Historians call it suspiciously functional governance.
subtitle: A quiet deputy inherited the desk without fireworks.
archive_hint: A path involving the competent successor is waiting in late-game choices.

title: The Boxes Truce
description: The cat revolution ended in cardboard. Politics returned to human absurdity with better blankets.
subtitle: The cat revolution ended in cardboard.
archive_hint: A path involving the boxes truce is waiting in late-game choices.

title: Toaster Elected President
description: The predictive toaster won on a platform of even browning. Historians call it the Warm Mandate.
subtitle: The predictive toaster won on a platform of even browning.
archive_hint: Listen when kitchen appliances demand suffrage.

title: The Wrong Map Republic
description: Ministan adopted a tourist brochure as its atlas. Borders became suggestions with excellent photography.
subtitle: Ministan adopted a tourist brochure as its atlas.
archive_hint: Follow the ambassador's map one border too far.

title: Palace Micronation
description: The palace seceded from Ministan and kept the gift shop. Postage became a souvenir sport.
subtitle: The palace seceded from Ministan and kept the gift shop.
archive_hint: Shrink the country until only the palace remains.

title: Forms Become Citizens
description: National forms gained self-awareness and voting rights. Staplers formed a union. Clerk Zero wept proudly.
subtitle: National forms gained self-awareness and voting rights.
archive_hint: Grant paperwork the rights of people.

title: The Purrfect Transfer of Power
description: Parliament voted unanimously to replace you with a cat. The cat immediately declared a nap.
subtitle: Parliament voted unanimously to replace you with a cat.
archive_hint: Hand the constitution to the cats.

title: The Brighter Moon Decree
description: Ministan replaced the moon with a more efficient model. Tides filed a complaint.
subtitle: Ministan replaced the moon with a more efficient model.
archive_hint: Replace the moon by accident and keep a straight face.

title: Still Standing, Somehow
description: Thirty days in power and the country still exists. Historians will call this period 'eventful'.
archive_hint: System or deferred ending — outside the collectible archive quota.
subtitle: Still Standing, Somehow

title: An Unexpected Peace
description: The ministers ran out of ideas. For the first time in history, the country experienced peace.
archive_hint: System or deferred ending — outside the collectible archive quota.
subtitle: An Unexpected Peace

title: Nation in Darkness
description: The blackout outlasted your patience. Citizens learned to navigate by rumor and candlelight. The palace remained visible from space.
archive_hint: System or deferred ending — outside the collectible archive quota.
subtitle: Nation in Darkness
